title: AsterMind Lesson — slides.json
description: Schema for the slides.json file in every lesson under examples/lessons/L*.

id.description: Stable identifier; must match the section element's id attribute in index.html.

title.description: Human-readable title shown in the deck.

stage.description: Optional grouping or animation stage hint (e.g. 'overview', 'demo', 'cta').

body.description: Optional inline HTML body. Most lessons leave this empty and put rich content directly in index.html.

demo.description: Optional name of an exported function in live-demo.js to run when this slide is shown.

notes_id.description: Optional override for which key in speaker-notes.js to look up. Defaults to id.
